reviews.review_description: Would love for this game to work again. It was my favorite! It no longer downloads.

This is possibly the best free game I have found on the Go, far better developed and more enjoyable than many of the paid games. Really good fun. Very immersive. I would happily pay for an extended version. I didn't want it to end.

I appreciate good storytelling in any art form, and that’s clearly what the developers here are going for. Less a game than an interactive sci-fi storybook, Angest nonetheless is high on atmosphere and creating a sense of unease. Although it is a linear story, you do influence how it unfolds through a series of choices you must make. I enjoyed it, and felt like the developers put some real thought behind the internal logic of the story’s multiple outcomes. There was some downside for me, though. It’s a bit repetitive going back and forth between the same three settings. I get that this monotony is kind of the point to the story, but just a little more variety would have helped. Also, the short length of the game (via several time jumps) makes the story’s progression feel rushed, robbing some of the great ideas of their impact. Overall though, it’s an interesting experience that will leave you thinking long after the credits roll. For a free app, that’s pretty rewarding.

Amazing game.. not scary.. my kids did it 

11 and 13 yr old

It's a brilliant little game. Other reviewers have covered the game in detail so I'll just say download, enjoy, and hope that the developers create more fantastic games. I'll happily give them my money for future games, but they've already earned it with this one.
I usually don’t play games, but after starting this game, I couldn’t stop. I played it till the end and was so happy with it! Great job on this game!!!
Konstantin doesn't display the answer options. Instead of replies there empty fields

Immersive, story driven, mind blowing game. I’ve yet to find the last ending (something to do with the painted door I guess) but so far I’ve enjoyed a lot. Hours of gameplay, plenty of replayability. I can’t believe this is a free game. I wish there were more like this. Thank you for this masterpiece!

Have really enjoyed this app. The graphics are excellent, the storyline becomes more  interesting as the game develops. I am still exploring so there may be a few surprises yet. 
Well worth downloading, runs really good on the Oculus Go.
The trailer looks amazing but it's unplayable on my galaxy s8 due to an unfixable audio lag problem. Please fix it I'd love to play the game!

developer_response.body:
Hey Nozactim! Are you playing with a bluetooth headphone? If so, this is a common issue with many Gear VR games. Could you please try using a wired phone and play the game again? If you are still having trouble. contact us on hello@blackriverstudios.net
Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_description: Very interesting experience, enjoyed it very much.

Can the dev explain why it needs all those permissions to my data when no other Go app i’ve installed  asks for permissions?
Will modify my review with an explanation. Thanks.
Best free game
What an amazing experience in this retro-style setting. Have not yet started level 2 because I am scared that the game will be over too soon :-(
Wish I knew about this game and studio sooner.  Game has engaging story with immersive voice acting.  Really well made and completely free!
This game is exciting I played it over and over and over again and still I love this game I love it and that robot and nothing is wrong these people are insane
This kind of game make vr experience the best
This was amazing, but we need a Part 2 please, and maybe a Part 3. I was so disappointed when it finished. More please.
